rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, avoiding implementation-level bindings in type contracts.
Use only visible identifiers and avoid package-qualified names in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Align helper declaration types with expression types (int, real, bool).
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the model.
Do not assume or guarantee implementation-only subcomponent paths in type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about missing packages or property sets
